channel.title: grandMA2 Manual Vault
channel.description: Last 10 notes on grandMA2 Manual Vault

item.title: grandMA2 Manual Vault
item.description: The complete grandMA2 User Manual as an interlinked knowledge vault — with full-text search (press /) and an interactive graph.

item.title: Timer
item.description: Timer Source MA Lighting Help – Timer Version 3.9 Timer Use Timer to set and manage stopwatches and countdowns.

item.title: Update the Software
item.description: Update the Software Source MA Lighting Help – Update the Software Version 3.9 Update the Software The chapter gives you information about how to update the grandMA2 if a new software version is available.

item.title: Windows
item.description: Manage windows Source MA Lighting Help – Manage windows Version 3.9 Manage windows This topic deals with windows, sheets, and pools you can create in the user-defined area.

item.title: Workspace
item.description: Workspace Source MA Lighting Help – Workspace Version 3.9 Workspace The chapter workspace deals in general with: Non-modifiable elements of visual display such as: -The executor bar Important: The executor bar cannot be resized, hidden or moved.

item.title: Worlds Filters and Masks
item.description: Worlds, Filters and Masks Source MA Lighting Help – Worlds, Filters and Masks Version 3.9 Worlds, Filters and Masks The grandMA2 have three different functions that can help you work faster and more efficient.

item.title: XYZ
item.description: XYZ Source MA Lighting Help – XYZ Version 3.9 XYZ XYZ adds virtual channels to the fixtures.

item.title: grandMA2 onPC Details
item.description: grandMA2 onPC Details Source MA Lighting Help – grandMA2 onPC Details Version 3.9 grandMA2 onPC Details The grandMA2 onPC has a special menu only available for the onPC.

item.title: Image Pool
item.description: Image Pool Source MA Lighting Help – Image Pool Version 3.9 Image Pool The grandMA2 has an image pool with predefined images, which cannot be edited.

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Introduction Source MA Lighting Help – Introduction Version 3.9 Introduction The grandMA2 represents MA Lighting’s most powerful console and offers the control of conventional light, moving lights, LED fixtures and media from one platform.
